title: Viral Peptide Health Claims

source.title: Doctor explains the science behind the peptide craze

segments.title: What peptides are
segments.audioText: Peptides are short strings of amino acids, linked by chemical bonds.
segments.transcript: Peptides are short strings of amino acids, linked by chemical bonds.
segments.translationZh: 肽係由氨基酸組成嘅短鏈，靠化學鍵連埋一齊。

points.label: Peptides are short strings
points.explanationZh: 先聽定義：are short strings，即係『係短鏈』。

points.label: of amino acids
points.explanationZh: of 後面講材料：amino acids，即係氨基酸。

points.label: linked by chemical bonds
points.explanationZh: linked by 表示『由……連接』；chemical bonds 係化學鍵。

segments.title: Building blocks
segments.audioText: Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins.
segments.transcript: Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins.
segments.translationZh: 氨基酸係蛋白質嘅基本組成部分。

points.label: Amino acids are
points.explanationZh: 開頭直接聽主詞同 be 動詞，知道句子係下定義。

points.label: the building blocks
points.explanationZh: building blocks 係常見比喻，意思係基本組成部分。

points.label: of proteins
points.explanationZh: of proteins 補充係邊樣嘢嘅組成部分：蛋白質。

segments.title: Natural peptides
segments.audioText: The human body naturally produces some peptides.
segments.transcript: The human body naturally produces some peptides.
segments.translationZh: 人體本身會自然產生一啲肽。

points.label: The human body
points.explanationZh: 留意 the human body 係整個身體，唔係某一個器官。

points.label: naturally produces
points.explanationZh: naturally 夾喺動詞前，表示『自然地、本身會』。

points.label: some peptides
points.explanationZh: some 表示『一啲』，唔係全部 peptide 都係外來產品。

segments.title: Not FDA-approved
segments.audioText: In many cases, these products or supplements haven't been FDA-approved.
segments.transcript: In many cases, these products or supplements haven't been FDA-approved.
segments.translationZh: 好多情況下，呢啲產品或者補充品都未獲 FDA 批准。

points.label: In many cases
points.explanationZh: 句首先限範圍：好多情況下，唔係話每一個情況都一樣。

points.label: products or supplements
points.explanationZh: or 連住兩類嘢：產品或者補充品。

points.label: haven't been FDA-approved
points.explanationZh: haven't been approved 係現在完成式被動語態，意思係『到而家都未被批准』。

segments.title: Gray market warning
segments.audioText: There's a gray market out there and it is like the wild, wild West.
segments.transcript: There's a gray market out there and it is like the wild, wild West.
segments.translationZh: 外面有一個灰色市場，情況就好似無規管嘅西部荒野。

points.label: There's a gray market
points.explanationZh: gray market 指灰色市場，唔一定完全非法，但規管同保障較模糊。

points.label: out there
points.explanationZh: out there 口語上指『市面上、外面』。

points.label: like the wild, wild West
points.explanationZh: 呢個比喻表示缺乏規則、好混亂；聽到重複 wild, wild 係強調語氣。

sentences: Peptides are short strings of amino acids, linked by chemical bonds.
Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins.
The human body naturally produces some peptides.
In many cases, these products or supplements haven't been FDA-approved.
There's a gray market out there and it is like the wild, wild West.

vocabulary.example: A peptide is a short string of amino acids.
vocabulary.translationZh: 肽係由氨基酸組成嘅短鏈。

vocabulary.example: Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins.
vocabulary.translationZh: 氨基酸係蛋白質嘅基本組成部分。

vocabulary.example: Proteins are important for the body.
The human body naturally produces some peptides.
vocabulary.translationZh: 人體本身會自然產生一啲肽。

vocabulary.example: Some supplements have not been FDA-approved.
vocabulary.translationZh: 有啲補充品未獲 FDA 批准。

vocabulary.example: The product has not been approved yet.
There is a gray market for some products.
vocabulary.translationZh: 有啲產品存在灰色市場。

phrases.example: Peptides are short strings of amino acids.

phrases.meaningZh: 蛋白質嘅基本組成部分
phrases.example: Amino acids are the building blocks of proteins.
There's a gray market out there.

phrases.meaningZh: 好似缺乏規管、混亂嘅地方
phrases.example: It is like the wild, wild West.

speakingPractice.prompt: 由 00:20 開始跟讀第一句，留意 peptides、amino acids、chemical bonds 三個重音。
speakingPractice.example: Peptides are short strings of amino acids, linked by chemical bonds.

speakingPractice.prompt: 重播 01:28，先寫低 In many cases，再聽 haven't been FDA-approved。
speakingPractice.example: In many cases, these products or supplements haven't been FDA-approved.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用 haven't been approved 改句，講一個未批准嘅產品或計劃。
speakingPractice.example: The new plan hasn't been approved.

speakingPractice.prompt: 用兩句英文複述：peptides 係咩？點解新聞提醒大家要小心？
speakingPractice.example: Peptides are short strings of amino acids. Some products have not been FDA-approved, so people should be careful.

notes: 先用時間點逐句重播，第一輪只聽關鍵名詞：peptides、amino acids、proteins。
第四句有被動語態 haven't been FDA-approved，可以拆成 haven't been / FDA-approved 兩段練。
第五句係口語比喻，聽到 wild, wild West 時先理解大意：缺乏規管、比較混亂。
看稿後再遮住 transcript，跟住原片節奏讀一次，唔需要加快。
